metadata.description: Personal multi-surface Claude system — core freshness/push hooks, session-hygiene + surface-check, domain skills, agents, commands, and composable rules. Single source of truth across Code, Cowork, and claude.ai/iPhone.

plugins.name: schnapp-os-core
plugins.description: Core layer: skills, commands, agents, and composable rules. Hooks (freshness gate, push-gate, backup) are wired in the repo .claude/settings.json against live paths, not via this plugin (decision 0011 #2).
